steps.title: Find the sentence core
steps.content: The sentence's core is that the resulting course was 2,500 miles long and modeled a vision of the treaty's aims. The detail about crossing seven borders must fit inside that structure without becoming another misjoined main verb.

steps.title: Reject verb errors
steps.content: Choice A puts a comma after and before a past-tense verb, producing an invalid structure. Choice B makes had crossed a competing finite verb and leaves modeled awkwardly attached. Choice C strings together was, crossed, and modeled with only a comma before the last verb. The answer is D.
